creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
devel/subversion fails to work properly on recent 12-CURRENT (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #1 r309142: Fri Nov 25 14:47:14 CET 2016) and rejects operation with 

# [/usr/src] : /usr/local/bin/svn st
Cannot open "/usr/ports/devel/subversion/work/subversion-1.9.4/subversion/libsvn_wc/.libs/libsvn_wc-1.so"
